---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem to help us improve Audiogrammer
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Set '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste any error output to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.3]
- FFmpeg version: [run `ffmpeg -version`]
- Audiogrammer version / commit: [e.g. latest main]

## Input details

- Background file type: [image / GIF / video]
- Audio file format: [e.g. MP3]
- Whisper model used: [e.g. base]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
